title: carex hispida subsp. retusa
intro: Carex hispida subsp. retusa is a subspecies of the Carex hispida plant, commonly known as the hispid sedge, a type of perennial grass-like plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Carex hispida subsp. retusa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections. Carex hispida subsp. retusa can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
